title: Punctuation: exclamation and question
description: Add expression with ! and ? — both need Shift
text: really! is that true? yes! when did you know? right now! how amazing! are you sure?

tips.text: ! is Shift + 1 — hold Shift with right pinky, hit 1 with left pinky
? is Shift + / — hold Shift with left pinky, hit / with right pinky

tips.target: really! is that true? yes! when did you

tips.text: Practice: hold Shift smoothly, don't stab

tips.target: know? right now! how amazing! are you sure?

character_tips.anna: Shift takes practice — hold smoothly, then hit the second key.
character_tips.maxim: ! and ? both need Shift. Use the opposite pinky for Shift than the target letter.
character_tips.klavochka: Exclaim joy! Ask softly! Both add feeling 💖
